calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Prove-Up Hearing And Brief Statement
Off Calendar Oct-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry Dorfman, Clerk: S.Vantree, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Stuart C. Gillman, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, AAA Northern California Nevada and Utah Insurance Exchange.

Donna Hughes, witness, sworn and examined.

No appearance by defaulted defendant Vanderbuilt Construction, Inc.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $142,669.99
Pre-Judgment Interest: $28.533.80
Attorney's Fees: $22,680.00
Costs: $795.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $194,678.79
Judgment signed in open court.
